external_baseline.name: fable5
notes: This file is not benchmark evidence.
Use it to document the expected shape for external baseline ingestion.
Do not convert status to completed until the underlying run artifact is available.
external_baseline.source: Example schema only. Replace with an authorized external Fable 5 run artifact before making comparative claims.

checks.evidence: 2/2 local harness runs completed with score 1.0
JSONL trace event written and parsed
CI workflow defines lint, typecheck, tests and coverage gates
workflow safe_actions exclude shell/eval style execution

direct_baseline.reason: The reference model is not currently available for direct reruns.

limitations: This is not a direct run against the retired reference model.
Remote CI and live external agent adapters still require separate evidence.
